DisplayName.SourceString: AXION SENTINEL'S LEVEL UP QUEST PACK
DisplayName.LocalizedString: AXION SENTINEL'S LEVEL UP QUEST PACK

DisclaimerText.SourceString: Note: This purchase is not eligible for refund. Not all items may be available in Save the World mode.
DisclaimerText.LocalizedString: Note: This purchase is not eligible for refund. Not all items may be available in Save the World mode.

ShortDescription.SourceString:
<text color="EBBC31FF">Get the Axion Sentinel outfit with purchase </><text color="FFFFFFFF">and complete weekly quests to earn up to 28 levels and unlock cosmetic rewards!</>

<text color="FFFFFFFF">Complete quests by collecting </><text color="EBBC31FF">Level Up Tokens</><text color="FFFFFFFF"> throughout the Chapter 4 map before the end of Season 1.</>

<text color="FFFFFFFF">Each week new quests become available and can be completed until the end of the season (March 10 2023 ET).</>
ShortDescription.LocalizedString:
<text color="EBBC31FF">Get the Axion Sentinel outfit with purchase </><text color="FFFFFFFF">and complete weekly quests to earn up to 28 levels and unlock cosmetic rewards!</>

<text color="FFFFFFFF">Complete quests by collecting </><text color="EBBC31FF">Level Up Tokens</><text color="FFFFFFFF"> throughout the Chapter 4 map before the end of Season 1.</>

<text color="FFFFFFFF">Each week new quests become available and can be completed until the end of the season (March 10 2023 ET).</>

Name.SourceString: <text color="FFFFFFFF">Every quest: 1 full XP level per token</>
Name.LocalizedString: <text color="FFFFFFFF">Every quest: 1 full XP level per token</>

Name.SourceString: <text color="FFFFFFFF">Week 1: </>Celestial Shell <text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" Case="AllCaps">Back Bling and </>Axion Sigil  <text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" Case="AllCaps">Item Wrap</>

Name.SourceString: <text color="FFFFFFFF">Week 3: </>Charged <text color="FFFFFFFF">Style for </>Axion Sentinel <text color="FFFFFFFF">Outfit (starts March 2 9:00AM ET)</>

ShortDescription.SourceString: <text color="FFFFFFFF">Complete all quests (28) to unlock all cosmetic rewards.</>
